classification.task_goal: Convince a customer named Tom to upgrade to a more expensive subscription for a business-specific search engine.
primary_constraints: Email must be addressed to Tom.
Company name must be Mega Corp. Inc.
Product must be a business-specific search engine.
Current cost is 0.01 cent per search and upgrade cost is 0.1 cent per search.
Email must include features: faster, contains internal document, better user management, AI features.
Email must be concise, max 100 words.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially failed to address the customer by name, included incorrect features, and did not meet the word count constraint. The user pointed out these issues, leading to a revised email that adhered to the constraints afterward.
